title: Netherite Trident
description: This pack is one that you MUST try! It adds a much-needed change to tridents to make them cooler than ever before, feel like a god while piercing your enemies with the BEST trident texture ever made!
body: This pack is one that you MUST try! It adds a much-needed change to tridents to make them cooler than ever before, feel like a **GOD** while piercing your enemies with the BEST trident texture ever made!
